reviews.comment:
Muy concurrido. Los baños le tienen que poner una persona que esté limpiando constantemente.

(Translated by Google)
Very crowded. The bathrooms need a person to clean them constantly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPeGNmeFlBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención en el shop. Variedad de productos y bebidas. Buena cafeteria. No tuve la oportunidad de cenar o almorzar por lo que no puedo opinar sobre comidas un poco más elaboradas que un sandwich de fiambre o facturas. Recomendado para hacer una pausa a los viajeros de ruta 9; que viniendo del norte, la misma no tiene muchos lugares donde descansar y seguir.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service at the shop. Variety of products and drinks. Good cafeteria. I didn't have the opportunity to have dinner or lunch, so I can't comment on more elaborate meals than a cold cuts sandwich or pastries. Recommended as a break for travelers on Route 9; coming from the north, the route doesn't have many places to rest and continue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPa2Z2aTJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los empleados unos genios, muy buena la atención!! Yo no entendía xq hay gente q conozco y se va de Sumampa a ojo d agua a cargar combustible!!!
El combustible es buena calidad y a precio razonable.
También para agregar, tiene todos los medios d pago. Hasta mercado pago!!!

(Translated by Google)
The employees are geniuses, and the service is excellent! I didn't understand why some people I know go all the way from Sumampa to Ojo d Agua to fill up with gas!
The fuel is good quality and reasonably priced.
Also, they have all payment methods. Even Mercado Pago!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPdHJ2RElnEAE

reviews.comment:
Un solo surtidor habilitado, con colas de muchos autos para casa lado. El barcito te arranca la cabeza. Se aprovechan que son la única opción viable en el camino.

(Translated by Google)
Only one pump is open, with lines of cars waiting in each direction. The little bar takes your brains out. They take advantage of the fact that they're the only viable option on the road.
